response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at Optilyz and re:cinq, plus current hands-on involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that maps directly to the role's AI agent requirement. Stack alignment is strong (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, AWS), backed by a BS in Computer Science and a consistent track record of craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP experience at re:cinq matches a key required skill
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB experience plus AWS CDK from Optilyz
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, and active community teaching
concerns: No Nest.js or Vitest explicitly mentioned in resume
Kotlin experience not listed; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms era)
Significant DLang focus in past roles may signal preference outside the primary stack

key_factors.factor: Seniority and full-stack breadth well beyond 6+ years
Missing explicit Nest.js/Vitest/Kotlin in stated stack
